metadata.description: Fallout 76 Update Archive Changelog - patch-by-patch analysis of SeventySix - XXUpdateMain.ba2 archives (00-12)
metadata.archive_type: UpdateMain (meshes only - behaviors, animations, models, effects)
metadata.note: Update archives OVERRIDE files from base archives. Any file present = changed/added in that patch. Archives also have UpdateTextures, UpdateVoices, and UpdateStream variants analyzed by size only.

00.estimated_update: Base update layer / early Expeditions era
00.notes: Foundation update layer. Contains core mesh overrides: behaviors, animtextdata, ATX shop items, base creatures, architecture. All 6805 files are 'new' since this is the first update archive. Heavy ATX (783 files) and animtextdata (2748 files) content.

01.notes: 699 new files. Modest additions: new ATX shop items (137 new), architecture updates, robot parts. CreateABot behaviors added. Relatively small patch.

02.estimated_update: Major content update - Gleaming Depths / Once in a Blue Moon era
02.notes: 1621 new files - MAJOR patch. First appearance of Gleaming Depths content. Scorchtongue creature introduced. Cat pet system (47 new animations). Large ATX content drop (286 new). Landscape rock updates. 2225MB total archive size (2nd largest).

03.estimated_update: Incremental patch with Atlantic City prep
03.notes: 268 new files. Bigfoot assets first appear (though minimal). Marching band/baton twirl emotes added. Flower box decorations. Alien whack-a-mole prop. ATX architecture focus.

04.notes: 965 new files. Massive ATX drop (441 new) - largest ATX addition. Flower crown clothes (30 new). Combat armor updates (36). Enclave turret system. Heavy clothing content. 73MB voice archive suggests new questline.

05.notes: 225 new files - smallest patch. ATX architecture focus (68 new). Building kit additions. Cat pet emote (high-five). Show of Force + Spacewalk emotes. Crystal ball effect.

06.estimated_update: Major content update - Skyline Valley / Fishing update
06.notes: 665 new files. SKYLINE VALLEY content first appears (6 references). Fishing system introduced - massive: fish actors (82), fishing rod weapons (34), fishing behaviors added to ALL creature types, hermit crab shop (13). Fishing furniture behaviors. 1128MB total.
key_content: Fishing system (82 fish + 34 fishing rod meshes)

07.notes: 270 new files. Screaming Eagle weapon introduced (new 1st-person animations with drum mag variants). Ghoul character face variants (glowing eyes). No Mic + Shaken emotes. ATX architecture/set dressing heavy.

08.estimated_update: Medium content update - .44 Pistol rework + Pets
08.notes: 753 new files. Major .44 pistol animation overhaul (bolt charge, auto fire variants). Robot dog pet (new mesh). Hairless cat + robocat variants. Backpack flair system (10 new). Large animtextdata update (336). 42MB voice content.

09.notes: 222 new files. Vicious dog pet system (8 meshes: base, glow, pack leader variants). Reclining sofa furniture animations. Alien behavior overhaul. Toxic Bob robot parts. ATX architecture/furniture focus.

10.estimated_update: MAJOR content update - Atlantic City / Rust Kingdom Raiders
10.notes: 3387 new files - BY FAR the largest update. Atlantic City content surge. Rust Kingdom Raiders (102 clothing meshes). Massive burn assets (362 for damaged/destroyed environments). Player character animations (518 new). Power armor overhaul (235). Super mutant updates (90). LOD landscape (270). Nitro pistol weapon. BOS pistol. Knockout mechanic. 3118MB total archive (largest). 134MB voices, 255MB streaming = major new questline.

11.estimated_update: Follow-up patch - Nitro Rifle + ATX content
11.notes: 477 new files. Nitro rifle weapon (full animation set: jiggle, fire, sighted variants). Cat behavior overhaul. ATX architecture (83 new), ATX actors (59 new). Building kit updates. Fasnacht event content touched.

12.notes: 250 new files. BIGFOOT fully introduced - super mutant behemoth variant with dedicated skeleton, despawn/intro VFX, tick projectile, tree bat. Big Bow emote. ATX set dressing focus (86). ATX architecture (52). ATX utility items (6). 121MB stream archive suggests environmental streaming content.

files_in_all_13_updates.description: Files modified in EVERY update - these are the most frequently patched assets
